source_inputs.finding: Canny branch is wired_ready_to_verify and local-first; EC2 is not required for initial extraction.
Main Flow contains ControlNetLoader, LoadImage, ControlNetApplyAdvanced, KSampler, VAEDecode, and SaveImage for the Canny lane.
The first two SDXL lanes are runtime-smoke proven, so the next lane should be intentionally queued rather than rerunning completed smoke paths.

candidate_comparison.reason: Direct Main Flow branch exists, SDXL/RealVisXL base path is proven locally and on EC2, and required node classes are present in local object_info.
Useful future image lane, but model/tooling requirements are heavier and less aligned with the already-proven local RealVisXL path.
Important downstream module, but detector/parser dependencies make it a larger dependency-provisioning task than the wired Canny branch.

promotion_blockers: ControlNet model source metadata, file size, and SHA256 are not yet recorded.
